name: Cake/Ice Cream Desserts from a Freezer Tray
recipeInstructions:
The freezer tray of your automatic refrigerator makes wonderful cake-and-ice-cream specialties in just a jiffy.
FROZEN LADYFINGERS: Pack the tray two thirds full with vanilla ice cream. Split ladyfingers, sprinkle generously with rum - arrange crosswise, with flat sides down, on the ice cream. Freeze. Before serving, spread a generous layer of whipped cream over the ladyfingers. Serve sliced.
BUTTERSCOTCH-ALMOND ICE-CREAM CAKE: Line the bottom of the tray with strips of bakers' poundcake. Spread with 1 pint vanilla, coffee, or chocolate ice cream. Freeze. Serve sliced, with butterscotch sauce and toasted almonds.
CHOCOLATE CHARLOTTE: Slice 8 sponge cake layers crosswise into 1/4-inch thick slices. Use to line the bottom and sides of the tray. Sprinkle with 2 tablespoons sherry; then spread with 1/2 pint chocolate ice cream. Top with the rest of the cake, with whipped cream. Makes 6 servings.
FREEZER-TRAY TRIFLE: In the tray, alternate layers of sponge cake strips with layers of vanilla, coffee, chocolate, butter pecan, or strawberry ice cream, ending with cake. Sprinkle with 1/4 cup rum. Freeze. Serve sliced with crushed berries and bottled eggnog sauce or custard sauce flavored with rum.
